pitfalls: Aggressive rate limits on new accounts
mitigations: Use tiktoken for accurate token counting
Add response validation and retry logic

pitfalls: Higher rate limits but still burst-sensitive
mitigations: Implement token bucket rate limiting client-side
Use multiple API keys for load distribution
Implement request queuing with 5-second delays between bursts
Use streaming to detect stalls early
Validate system prompts for forbidden content
Retry with exponential backoff up to 10 times
Pin specific API versions in URL
Host in EU regions if possible

pitfalls: Cold start times for rare models
mitigations: Set max_tokens to reduce queue time
Use v2 API for better reliability
Implement embed job polling with backoff
Keep models warm with health checks

pitfalls: Test mode vs live mode confusion
mitigations: Verify webhooks with tolerance clock skew

pitfalls: API instability during EU business hours
mitigations: Use polling backup for critical updates
Use event webhooks for status tracking

pitfalls: EU vs US region endpoint confusion

mitigations: Use file_id reuse for large files
Implement lifecycle rules for incomplete uploads
Set bucket policy only at creation
Use lease IDs for atomic operations
Disable SSL verify for broken sites
Use GPS over IP when possible

pitfalls: Enterprise key vs Basic key features
